title: NANA Funds $1 Million in Each In-Region Community for Economic Investments
summary: KOTZEBUE, Alaska, Sept. 23, 2022 – NANA Regional Corporation, Inc. (NANA) will provide $1 million in additional funding for Village Economic Investment (VEI) grants in each of NANA’s 11 communities. NANA’s board of directors approved the spending at their board meeting on Sept. 9 in Kotzebue. The VE...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 19 September, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 19 September, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: AFN Requests Assistance for Western Alaska in Wake of Historic Storm
